response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth across 19 years of full-stack development and strong knowledge-sharing through teaching and open-source work, the resume reveals a critical disqualifying gap: zero evidence of people management or team leadership experience. This role explicitly requires 'Full-time people-leadership' with '2 years in people management' as a minimum requirement. His background positions him as an excellent Staff/Principal Engineer for engineering productivity, but not as a manager ready for 1:1s, performance management, and team development.
strengths: 19+ years of full-stack development with deep expertise in testing, TDD, and code quality advocacy
Proven knowledge-sharing through workshops, Selenium courses, and open-source libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Hands-on developer-tools experience including CI/infrastructure setup, MCP code generators, and GIS platform tooling
concerns: No evidence of people management, direct reports, hiring decisions, or team leadership—a critical minimum requirement
Developer tools experience is distributed across roles rather than the focused 3-year specialization in compilers, build systems, or test automation
No demonstrated experience with organizational change, roadmap planning, performance feedback, or strategic team development

key_factors.factor: Complete absence of people management experience
Strong individual technical contributor with testing/quality focus
Developer tools exposure present but not sufficiently focused or demonstrated at scale
